title: Relate Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander culture to sites work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Relate Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander culture to sites work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Apply understanding of local traditional cultural interactions when working with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander People

pcs.text: Integrate the relationship to the land into daily work routines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Integrate the relationship to the land into daily work routines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Integrate the relationship to the land into daily work routines.

pcs.text: Determine relationships of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander objects, features and cultural landscapes to cultural beliefs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine relationships of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander objects, features and cultural landscapes to cultural beliefs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine relationships of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander objects, features and cultural landscapes to cultural beliefs.

pcs.text: Determine the interrelationship of discrete local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites to cultural interactions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the interrelationship of discrete local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites to cultural interactions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the interrelationship of discrete local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites to cultural interactions.

pcs.text: Acknowledge and respect traditional knowledge, belief systems, customs and cultural practices in managing Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Acknowledge and respect traditional knowledge, belief systems, customs and cultural practices in managing Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Acknowledge and respect traditional knowledge, belief systems, customs and cultural practices in managing Country.

pcs.text: Ensure Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) rights have been addressed with local Communities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) rights have been addressed with local Communities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) rights have been addressed with local Communities.
